meaning: n.进口货(常用复数),进口,输入,意思,重要性vt.输入,进口,含...的意思,重要,引入vi.有关系,有重要性
examples: Such arguments are of little import.
The country has to import most of its raw materials.
Just barely behind in import is one of the world's great music events: Jazz Fest.
Within a year it had its hands on 25% of the import market for Alaskan pollock.
